pages.text: Leo was building a tower with his green bricks. It was wobbly, but he was trying his best.
Then the tower fell. Leo felt something warm rising inside him, like a tiny volcano waking up.
His hands felt tight. His tummy felt fizzy. Leo didn't mean to feel this way — it just arrived.
Pip noticed. "Something interesting is happening inside you," Pip whispered, with kind eyes.
Leo sat down and breathed slowly. The warm feeling didn't vanish — but it stopped bubbling quite so fast.
